_image_size_requirements.billboard: Required image size: 64x44px display (any image works, auto-cropped to fill). For best quality upload a square or landscape image at least 300x200px — it will be cropped to fit.
_image_size_requirements.sidebar: Required image size: 300x250px display (any image works, auto-cropped to fill). For best quality upload a square image at least 600x500px — it will be cropped to fit.
